nasb.text: The word which came to Jeremiah from the Lord in the days of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah, saying,

esv.text: The word that came to Jeremiah from the Lord in the days of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah:

cnv.text: 在猶大王約西亞的兒子約雅敬作王的日子，耶和華有話臨到耶利米，說：

ccb.text: 犹大王约西亚的儿子约雅敬执政期间，耶和华对耶利米说：
